news.t: DoubleLine Launches Equity and Commodity Exchange-Traded Funds

holdings.infoBox: DFVE is an equity ETF with a total of 467 individual holdings. The top holdings are Optimum Communications stock at 0.44%, Marvell Technology at 0.30%, Kohl's at 0.29%, KLA Corporation at 0.28%, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 0.27%.

overview.description: The DoubleLine Fortune 500 Equal Weight ETF (DFVE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Barclays Fortune 500 Equal Weighted index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US stocks, selected based on revenue. The portfolio is constructed from the Fortune 500 list. DFVE was launched on Jan 31, 2024 and is issued by DoubleLine.

data.title: DoubleLine Launches Equity and Commodity Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: TAMPA, Fla. , Feb. 1, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- The DoubleLine Fortune 500 Equal Weight ETF (ticker symbol DFVE) and the DoubleLine Commodity Strategy ETF (DCMT) began trading today on the NYSE Arca exchan...
